title: Iran shot down F-15E, Trump wont say what US will do
snippet: Trump wont say what US will do if missing pilot from shot down F-15E is harmed. First American aviator shot down over enemy territory in decades.

title: Iran rejected 48-hour ceasefire proposal
snippet: Iran rejected a US proposal for 48-hour ceasefire, reports Iranian media.

title: Qatar refuses mediation role on Iran War
snippet: Qatar refused taking the leading role in mediation on Iran War, complicating ceasefire. Source: WSJ

title: Trump blindsided as Iran rejects ceasefire
snippet: Trump BLINDSIDED as IRAN REJECTS CEASEFIRE!!

title: Iran says Trump withdrawal created this crisis
snippet: Trump created this situation. He ripped up Obama nuclear deal, then bombed Iran during negotiations.

title: Iran obliterated F-15E and A-10 today
snippet: Iran has OBLITERATED F-15E Strike Eagle and A-10 Thunderbolt II fighter jets today. Iran rejected 48-hour ceasefire.

title: Pakistan ceasefire mediation collapsed
snippet: Pakistan efforts to mediate US-Iran ceasefire reportedly collapsed.

title: Polymarket 91% odds US forces stay in Iran
snippet: Oil at 2008 highs, Iran rejected 48h ceasefire. Polymarket: 91% odds US forces stay. Hormuz push could send oil parabolic.

title: France made deal with Iran for Hormuz passage
snippet: France made a deal with Iran behind Trump back to get container ship through Hormuz. Iran holds the cards.

title: Trump Keep the oil from Iran
snippet: Trump quote on Iran: Keep the oil, anyone?

title: Trump to unveil 1.5T defense budget largest since WWII
snippet: President Trump to unveil 1.5 trillion defense budget, largest yearly US military spending increase since WWII.

title: Gasoline crossed $4/gallon first time since Aug 2022
snippet: US gasoline crossed average of $4 a gallon for first time since August 2022.
